mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_screenings WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, screening_type_id AS screeningTypeId, last_completed_date AS lastCompletedDate, next_due_date AS nextDueDate, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM user_screenings WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_screenings (user_id, screening_type_id, last_completed_date, next_due_date, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{screeningTypeId}, #{lastCompletedDate}, #{nextDueDate}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: select us.id as user_screening_id, us.screening_type_id as screening_type_id, st.name as screening_type, us.last_completed_date, st.recommended_interval_days from user_screenings us join screening_types st on us.screening_type_id = st.id where us.user_id = #{userId} and st.is_active = 1 order by us.id asc

select us.id as user_screening_id, st.id as screening_type_id, st.name as screening_type, us.last_completed_date, st.recommended_interval_days from user_screenings us join screening_types st on us.screening_type_id = st.id where us.user_id = #{userId} and us.screening_type_id = #{screeningTypeId} limit 1
select id, user_id, screening_type_id, last_completed_date, next_due_date, created_at, updated_at from user_screenings where user_id = #{userId} and screening_type_id = #{screeningTypeId} limit 1
